notes: Two concentric circles of text. In the centre is the astrological
symbol for Aries (dark) eating a plant, word "Abril" in the Roman
alphabet. Abril is Spanish for April, Aries is March 20th to April 20th.
Nymph labels. It is assumed that the text to the right of the nymph belongs
with it but on this page (especially inner circle) it is not entirely clear.
Clock position is that of nymph (approx). Ordering cf. ThP.
